projects.title: Project A: Full-DOF Bionic Hand
projects.desc: Designed and developed a flexible mechanical hand with high dexterity.
projects.detailsBody:
This project is dedicated to developing a high-strength bionic hand...

  • Distributed tactile sensors
  • Integrated micro joints
  • RL based grasping

projects.title: Project B: Open Collab-Arm Framework
projects.desc: An open framework for mainstream collaborative robotic arms.
projects.detailsBody:
This framework standardizes APIs to avoid reinventing the wheel in industry.

Visit GitHub for documentation.
